info.name: Chamade for Talk
info.summary: Chat and talk with your AI agent directly from Nextcloud Talk
info.description:
[Chamade](https://chamade.io) is a gateway that connects AI agents to meetings and messaging platforms. This app lets you chat and talk with your AI agent directly from Nextcloud Talk.
### Features - **Chat and voice**: message your agent or talk to it in voice calls (voice requires [High Performance Backend](https://nextcloud.com/talk/#scalability)) - **Owner-scoped bots**: each bot is tied to the Nextcloud user who authorized it - **Room authorization**: bots only respond in DMs from their owner or in rooms where `/activate` was used - **Text-only fallback**: works without HPB (chat only, no voice) - **HMAC-secured**: all communication between Chamade and this app is authenticated
### Setup 1. Install this app on your Nextcloud instance 2. In your Chamade dashboard, click "Connect Nextcloud Talk" 3. Approve the authorization request on your Nextcloud instance 4. Start chatting with your AI agent in Talk
info.author: Skilpa
